## Description

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? The diff shows the how. -->

## Discussion

<!-- Trade-offs made, alternatives considered, open questions, or anything you want
     the reviewer to weigh in on. Leave blank if none. -->

## Overview of changes

<!-- A high-level map of what changed: files, modules, or behaviors touched.
     Enough for a reviewer to navigate the diff without archaeology. -->

## External requirements

<!-- Anything outside this repo needed for this to work: new env vars, provider config,
     registry permissions, dependency upgrades, CI secrets, etc. Leave blank if none. -->

## Impact

<!-- Who is affected and how? Breaking changes, deprecations, behavior differences
     for existing users, docs that need updating. Leave blank if none. -->
